title: Software Engineer I
description: Rippling is building the one app your company runs on. We're creating an all-in-one platform that manages everything from payroll and benefits to IT and security. Our mission is to eliminate the chaos of work infrastructure. We're hiring a Software Engineer I to join our Boise office and help us build the next generation of HR technology.
responsibilities: Build and maintain backend services for our core platform using Python and Go
Collaborate with product managers and designers to turn requirements into scalable solutions
Participate in code reviews and contribute to raising engineering standards
Write clear, testable code with comprehensive documentation
Debug production issues and implement monitoring/alerting improvements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field (or equivalent experience)

benefits: Competitive equity package with meaningful upside
Medical, dental, and vision coverage (100% company-paid for employee)
Learning budget and conference attendance support
